message:
fix(fastapi-output): fix rich_rust dependency and re-enable crate

- Use git dependency for rich_rust instead of broken path
- Re-enable fastapi-output in workspace members
- Fix ownership error in routing_debug.rs (use refs in loop)
- Apply cargo fmt formatting fixes

Closes: bd-3jgt
Unblocks: bd-181l, bd-2lxs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
